1137.issue: [W1137] "common.licenseInformation.link" should not point to this repository's [README.md](https://github.com/copystring/ioBroker.roborock/blob/master/README.md) or LICENSE file

1143.issue: [E1143] [package.json](https://github.com/copystring/ioBroker.roborock/blob/master/package.json) "main" points to a TypeScript file. Please set "common.compact": false in [io-package.json](https://github.com/copystring/ioBroker.roborock/blob/master/io-package.json).

3027.issue: [W3027] Workflow "test-and-release.yml": testing for OS macos is missing in job "adapter-tests". Add corresponding tests to "test-and-release.yml" or adapt [package.json](https://github.com/copystring/ioBroker.roborock/blob/master/package.json) "os" accordingly.

5049.issue: [E5049] process.env is used in source files (scripts/expert-review.js, scripts/prepare_appplugin_bundles.js, src/lib/map/q10/Q10YxMapParser.ts). process.env is incompatible with compact mode. Please use adapter configuration instead.

5050.issue: [E5050] process.exit() used in  (scripts/appplugins.js, scripts/check-eslint-peer-deps.js, scripts/check-lockfile.js, scripts/expert-review.js, scripts/extract_appplugin_translations.js, scripts/prepare_appplugin_bundles.js, scripts/run-package-tests.js). This is incompatible with compact mode as it terminates the entire host process. Remove process.exit() or set common.compact to false at [io-package.json](https://github.com/copystring/ioBroker.roborock/blob/master/io-package.json).

5051.issue: [S5051] Custom sleep/wait function(s) found in source files (src/main.ts). Consider using the built-in "this.delay()" method provided by the ioBroker adapter base class instead.

5054.issue: [S5054] method "setObject()" should be avoided. Please use "setObjectNotExists()" or "extendObject()" instead.

5060.issue: [W5060] Package "uuid" is listed in dependencies of [package.json](https://github.com/copystring/ioBroker.roborock/blob/master/package.json) but not imported or required by any scanned source file. Dependency might be unused.

6022.issue: [S6022] CHANGELOG_OLD.md exists but no link to it was found in [README.md](https://github.com/copystring/ioBroker.roborock/blob/master/README.md). Consider adding a link to CHANGELOG_OLD.md at the end of the Changelog section.

0077.issue: [E0077] "eslint.config.mjs" should use installed "@iobroker/eslint-config" via `import config from '@iobroker/eslint-config';`.

0082.issue: [S0082] Package "go2rtc-static" (dependencies) can be updated from 1.2.0 to 1.9.4. The newer version has been published for 646 days. Please evaluate updating [package.json](https://github.com/copystring/ioBroker.roborock/blob/master/package.json).

0066.issue: [W0066] "@types/node":"^25.9.0" at [package.json](https://github.com/copystring/ioBroker.roborock/blob/master/package.json) allows major version greater than 22. Downgrade to node.js 22.x.x to avoid wrong typing is recommended.

0078.issue: [W0078] Remove obsolete eslint/prettier devDependencies when using "@iobroker/eslint-config": @eslint/eslintrc, @eslint/js, @typescript-eslint/eslint-plugin, @typescript-eslint/parser, eslint, eslint-config-prettier, eslint-plugin-import, eslint-plugin-jsdoc, eslint-plugin-prettier, eslint-plugin-react, eslint-plugin-react-hooks, eslint-plugin-unicorn, prettier, typescript-eslint.
